title: Holy Light Eternal

sections.label: Intro
lines: Generate a soft, subtle track with smooth transitions.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: The Lord reigns, let the nations be glad,
He dwells above, in clouds of glory clad.
His justice flows like rivers untamed,
Holy and mighty, forever proclaimed.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Let the earth tremble, the heavens adore,
Lift up your voices, let praises soar.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Exalt the Lord, enthroned on high,
Worship His name, the Holy cry.
Mighty and just, His love never fades,
Let His glory fill all the days.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: From Zion’s hill, His voice declares,
The nations bow, their burdens He bears.
Mercy and truth, in His shadow found,
His grace unending, a radiant crown.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Let the earth tremble, the heavens adore,
Lift up your voices, let praises soar.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Exalt the Lord, enthroned on high,
Worship His name, the Holy cry.
Mighty and just, His love never fades,
Let His glory fill all the days.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Holy is He, who answers our call,
The King of all kings, the Lord of all.
Through fire and storm, His presence remains,
His holy name forever sustains.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Exalt the Lord, enthroned on high,
Worship His name, the Holy cry.
Mighty and just, His love never fades,
Let His glory fill all the days.

sections.label: Outro
lines: His throne of light, a beacon shines,
Forever holy, in endless time.

epigraph: Exalt ye the LORD our God
styleNote: Full Ethereal Sound · Shimmering Guitars And Harmonies · Repeating With Emotional Crescendo
